query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Paris
Destination: Marsa Matruh
Dates: 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-05
Budget: Balanced
Party: Couple
Interests: Eco Tourism, Cultural Exploration

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan JSON is well-formed and follows a consistent structure with all expected fields present and correctly typed.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The suggested hotel is located in Marsa Matruh. The daily cost of EGP 1200 aligns with a 'balanced' budget, even though the hotel's 3.3 rating with 0 reviews is concerning for a 'comfortable royal palace' establishment.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The user specified 'Origin: Paris', but the plan's summary mentions 'from Cairo to Marsa Matruh'. The 'Flights/Transport' budget of EGP 1000 is entirely insufficient for international flights from Paris, indicating a failure to account for a major budget component from the user's origin.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Activities within each day are consistently ordered from morning to evening, with lunch and dinner breaks appropriately placed.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (Destination, Duration, Budget, Number of People, and Dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: Embark on a captivating 5-day journey for a couple from Cairo to Marsa Matruh, exploring ancient history, cultural sites, and the stunning natural beauty of the Egyptian Mediterranean coast, with a balanced budget and a focus on eco-tourism and cultural exploration.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace
activities.description: Arrive in Marsa Matruh and check into your comfortable hotel, the Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace, your base for exploring the city.

activities.title: Visit Sidi El-Awwam Mosque
activities.description: Begin your cultural journey at the beautiful Sidi El-Awwam Mosque, a popular and highly-rated spiritual landmark in Marsa Matruh.

activities.title: Discover Salt Cave Salman
activities.description: Explore the unique Salt Cave Salman, an intriguing cultural site offering a distinct experience in Marsa Matruh.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch featuring local and international cuisine at New Sultana restaurant.

activities.title: Explore مطروح جنه وروح
activities.description: Continue your afternoon with a visit to مطروح جنه وروح, a popular and highly-rated cultural spot.

activities.title: Visit مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓
activities.description: Conclude your day's attractions with a visit to مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓, another interesting cultural highlight in the area.

activities.title: Dinner at Rommel House Restaurant
activities.description: Savor your dinner at Rommel House Restaurant, offering a blend of local and international dishes.

activities.title: Explore سيڤانا ترافيل
activities.description: Start your day with a visit to سيڤانا ترافيل, a highly-rated cultural destination.

activities.title: Visit اكوا بارك كيلوباترا
activities.description: Enjoy the facilities and atmosphere at اكوا بارك كيلوباترا, a fun cultural spot.

activities.title: Lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant
activities.description: Indulge in local and international flavors for lunch at the charming Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant.

activities.title: Relax at شاطئ رأس الحكمة
activities.description: Spend a relaxing afternoon at the beautiful شاطئ رأس الحكمة, enjoying the coastal scenery.

activities.title: Explore شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد
activities.description: Continue your beach exploration at شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد, another lovely cultural beach spot.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد, known for its local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Visit Rommel's Cave Museum
activities.description: Begin your day with a fascinating visit to Rommel's Cave Museum, an important historical and cultural site.

activities.title: See صخرة شاطئ روميل
activities.description: Explore the iconic صخرة شاطئ روميل, a rock formation at Rommel's Beach offering scenic views.

activities.title: Lunch at MR.Chick
activities.description: Grab a satisfying lunch at MR.Chick, a highly-rated restaurant offering local and international fare.

activities.title: Enjoy the Marsa Matruh Beach
activities.description: Spend some leisurely time at a beautiful beach in Marsa Matrouh, soaking up the sun and sea.

activities.title: Visit جبل روميل مطروح
activities.description: Ascend جبل روميل مطروح (Rommel Mountain) for panoramic views of the area and a cultural experience.

activities.title: Dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر
activities.description: Enjoy a late dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر, known for its diverse menu and high ratings.

activities.title: Explore لسان شط الغرام
activities.description: Start your day by visiting لسان شط الغرام, a beautiful coastal cultural attraction.

activities.title: Experience Cleopatra Bath
activities.description: Discover the historical and natural beauty of Cleopatra Bath, a unique sea pool believed to have been used by Queen Cleopatra.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Return to New Sultana for another delicious lunch experience with local and international dishes.

activities.title: Stroll ممشي الافاتار avatar
activities.description: Enjoy a pleasant walk along ممشي الافاتار avatar, a popular promenade offering cultural insights and views.

activities.title: Walk ممشي باب البحر
activities.description: Continue your promenade exploration at ممشي باب البحر, another scenic walking path with cultural significance.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Savor authentic grilled dishes and Arabic food at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي for dinner.

activities.title: Explore ممشي الخمارى السياحى
activities.description: Start your final day with a visit to ممشي الخمارى السياحى, a tourist promenade offering lovely views and cultural ambiance.

activities.title: Walk Ava ممشي مطروح
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely walk along Ava ممشي مطروح, another charming promenade in Marsa Matrouh.

activities.title: Lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Have your final Marsa Matruh lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي, enjoying their specialty grills.

activities.title: Visit شمسيات شاطئ زمرده
activities.description: Spend some time at شمسيات شاطئ زمرده, a cultural beach spot known for its umbrellas and atmosphere.

activities.title: Explore مصيد koko
activities.description: Discover مصيد koko, an interesting cultural site to round off your visit.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at كبسة برقه
activities.description: Enjoy a final dinner at كبسة برقه, known for its local and international specialties before your departure.

budget_breakdown: Food: EGP 5000 (10 meals for 2 people at EGP 250/person/meal)
